verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Like the woman at the well I was seeking For things that could not satisfy: And then I heard my Savior speaking, "Draw from my well that never shall run dry".

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Fill my cup, Lord, I lift it up, Lord! Come and quench this thirsting of my soul; Bread of heaven, Feed me till I want no more Fill my cup, fill it up and make me whole!

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: There are millions in this world who are craving The pleasures earthly things afford; But none can match the wondrous treasure That I find in Jesus Christ my Lord.
